title: Implement Authorization and View-Only Mode
description: Enforce campaign owner authorization for all modifications and implement view-only UI for non-owners.
execution_steps: Add ownership validation in backend for all Campaign and Timeline modification endpoints.
Update Frontend to conditionally hide 'New Tick', 'Edit', and 'Delete' buttons if user is not the owner.
definition_of_done: Unauthorized requests to edit/create ticks return 403.
UI correctly hides edit controls for non-owners.
